CS Student & Builder
I notice problems. Then I fix them.

Junior at Rutgers who ships products fast with AI. Built StorePilot after watching local stores struggle with spreadsheets. Bad at syntax, good at solving problems.

View ProjectsGitHubContactResume

> ABOUT_ME

Founder-Engineer Mindset

Bridging technical depth with operational execution

I build things because I get annoyed by broken systems.

Junior at Rutgers studying CS. I noticed local stores still tracking inventory in notebooks and spreadsheets—missing money leaks, overstocking, running out of essentials. So I built StorePilot to fix that.

I'm not a coding prodigy. Ask me to write a single program from memory and I'll probably forget the syntax. But give me AI tools and a week? I'll ship you a working product. That's how I built StorePilot. That's how I built this portfolio. That's how I work.

Before coding, I managed operations teams and learned something important: most problems aren't tech problems, they're process problems wearing tech clothes. I build connections through soccer, the gym, and actually talking to people. Want to know what I'm building next? Let's grab coffee.

PythonSQLAI/MLAnalyticsLeadership

Teams Led

People Served

Shipped Products

Nope

> FEATURED_PROJECTS

Building Real Solutions

AI-powered systems and operational tools I've built

FeaturedLive BetaSolo Founder

StorePilot

Inventory management that actually makes sense

Local stores were drowning in spreadsheets and notebooks. I built something better.

Problem

Walk into any local store and ask how they track inventory. Notebooks. Spreadsheets. Missing money. Overstocked shelves. Running out of essentials. It's 2026 and we're still doing this.

Solution

Built a tool that tracks inventory, spots money leaks, and tells you what to reorder before you run out. No jargon. Just works.

Key Features

  • •Shipped working product in under 3 months using AI-assisted development
  • •Built analytics that spot inventory patterns humans miss
  • •Designed for people who aren't tech people
  • •Learned I can build faster with AI than most people can with perfect memory
PythonSQLAI toolsActual problem-solving

> SERVICES

I build things that work

Websites, apps, and tools. Clean code, fast loading, mobile-friendly.

Web Development

Websites that actually work. Clean code, fast loading, mobile-friendly. From landing pages to full-stack apps with auth and databases.

$500–1,500

Standard sites

Application Development

Custom software for your specific problem. Multi-tenant platforms, analytics dashboards, automation tools, inventory systems.

$3,000+

Contact for exact scope

Web Design

Functional, professional design that doesn't frustrate users. Clear navigation, fast performance, layouts that work everywhere.

Included

With development, or $25–40/hour standalone

Why Work With Me

Real Technical Skills

I don't just design — I build. Multi-tenant architecture, databases, authentication. I've shipped production code.

Operations Background

Led teams of 10-15 people before learning to code. I understand business needs, not just technical specs.

Data-Driven

Google Data Analytics certified. I build systems that track metrics and help you make better decisions.

Not sure what you need?

Email me and we'll figure it out.

Plainsboro Recreation

BounceU|West Windsor, NJ

  • Led team of 15 and kept everyone sane during busy Saturdays
